title: On the Mysteries: Theurgy and the Gods
description: Iamblichus defends ritual practice (theurgy) as superior to philosophy for achieving union with the divine.
introduction: Iamblichus defends ritual practice (theurgy) as superior to philosophy for achieving union with the divine.

translation.text: It is not thought that links the theurgist to the gods. It is the power of the unspeakable rites.
